name: Forsaken || Noli
description:
♪ “You say I'm your savior...

Then I need you to bow.” ♫

· ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ────── ·

Something doesn't feel right...

⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺

This was requested by: @Ringmaster_F

Thanks for suggesting this!!

⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺

There wasn't much with the scenario, so I decided to improvise!

Basically, you are a undercover detective and just trying to get rid of Noli's cult. After knocking out one of the cult members, you take their clothes and walk in saying you were new to the cult!

But HE knew better...
